---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for ProjectAchilles
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Module

- [ ] Browser (Test browsing)
- [ ] Analytics (Elasticsearch integration)
- [ ] Endpoints (LimaCharlie integration)
- [ ] Core/Infrastructure
- [ ] New Module

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem this feature would solve. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Cases

Describe specific scenarios where this feature would be useful:

1.
2.
3.

## Mockups/Examples

If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples from other tools.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.

## Implementation Considerations

If you have thoughts on how this might be implemented, share them here:

- [ ] Frontend changes needed
- [ ] Backend changes needed
- [ ] New API endpoints required
- [ ] Database/storage changes
- [ ] Third-party integrations
